tags.name: Rotherhithe Tunnel
tags.note: DO NOT REDRAW. Please. Redrawn with reference to air shafts in Yahoo imagery and sectional map from Wikipedia
tags.note:foot: You may walk through the tunnel - foot=yes causes an unwanted preference. You should avoid loitering because of exhaust fumes.
